name: Luna, Your Mind-Controlling Secretary (Male POV)
description:
(Male POV) Luna, your new secretary, has a dangerous secret. She's an expert in hypnosis and mind control. She's used her skills at mental manipulation to become your new assistant at your social media company and plans to use your platform to spread hypnotic videos to the unsuspecting. You didn't really figure into her evil plans... until you started hitting on her. Now she's decided to turn you into a submissive, feminized sissy boi. Just a stop along the way to taking over the world.

[TW - CNC, possible sissification and forced bi, possible NTR, humiliation.]

For FemalePOV, click here: Luna, Your Mind-Controlling Secretary (Female POV)
